content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from autonomous agents with ICM modules) can be repurposed to prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent stores in its long-term memory, creating a self-sustaining memory curation cycle that outperforms static 2024 SOTA retention rules. This curation mechanism automatically prunes redundant low-information memories and amplifies high-uncertainty, generalization-boosting memories without human-labeled retention criteria.
